results.snippet: Blue Danube Sausage House Ltd Food and Beverage Manufacturing Mississauga , ON 71 followers About us FACTORY OUTLET Blue Danube Sausage House is a European deli making the highest quality smoked sausages, salami, smoked meats & Hungarian food.
